creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
All ports affected by this commit https://codeberg.org/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/82b56c14531faee93344e59d3ec30dcc3cf5c2e0 are still marked as BROKEN in quarterly 2024Q1 because this commit https://codeberg.org/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/e3a7ca28c8a6c9145694a242b1e69974a0f74e60#diff-2f73296da579139de622efdd9616450ddc6c2807 was not merged to quarterly. 
This means no quarterly packages built. Can this be fixed in 2024Q1?
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/?h=2024Q1
